Jonathan Seigel, Esq. of the Law Offices of STEVEN S. ROSENTHAL 928-7300 for Plaintiff and opposing party

For Stay Of The Judgment Pending Appeal

APPEARANCE:
Jonathan Seigel, Esq. of the Law Offices STEVEN S. ROSENTHAL 928-7300 for Plaintiff and opposing party
Mr. Seigel did not give notice of intent to argue. Therefore, no argument was entertained. Tentative ruling adopted -- defendant STEVEN YOURKE's motion for a stay of judgment pending appeal is Granted -- no opposition filed. (JJM) Eric Throne, CSR 7855
